languages.text: Огромные дыры несимметричных туннелей смотрят вслед вашему судну словно тысячи темных глаз.
The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.
languages.original_text: Огромные дыры несимметричных туннелей смотрят вслед вашему судну словно тысячи темных глаз.

traits.locale_text: The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.
The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.
The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.

languages.text: 左右非対称のトンネルの巨大な穴は、まるで千の暗闇の目のように、あなたの船を見つめている。
languages.original_text: The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.

traits.locale_text: 左右非対称のトンネルの巨大な穴は、まるで千の暗闇の目のように、あなたの船を見つめている。

languages.text: Los enormes agujeros de los túneles asimétricos parecen observar tu nave como mil ojos oscuros.
languages.original_text: The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.

traits.locale_text: Los enormes agujeros de los túneles asimétricos parecen observar tu nave como mil ojos oscuros.

languages.text: 那些不对称隧道的巨大洞口，就像千百只漆黑的眼睛，死死盯着你的舰船。
languages.original_text: The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.

traits.locale_text: 那些不对称隧道的巨大洞口，就像千百只漆黑的眼睛，死死盯着你的舰船。

languages.text: Die riesigen Löcher der asymmetrischen Gänge blicken deinem Schiff wie tausend dunkle Augen nach.
languages.original_text: The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.

traits.locale_text: Die riesigen Löcher der asymmetrischen Gänge blicken deinem Schiff wie tausend dunkle Augen nach.

languages.text: Asimetrik tünellerin devasa delikleri, binlerce karanlık göz gibi geminin arkasından bakıyor.
languages.original_text: The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.

traits.locale_text: Asimetrik tünellerin devasa delikleri, binlerce karanlık göz gibi geminin arkasından bakıyor.

languages.text: Les trous béants des tunnels asymétriques fixent votre vaisseau comme autant d'yeux sombres.
languages.original_text: The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.

traits.locale_text: Les trous béants des tunnels asymétriques fixent votre vaisseau comme autant d'yeux sombres.
